title: `JSON_SCHEMA_VALID` returns wrong result for strange schema
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO json_test (id, data) VALUES (1, '{"const": false}');
SELECT CASE WHEN data = '{"const": false}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM json_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CASE WHEN data = '42' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM json_test WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: JSON_SCHEMA_VALID returns incorrect validation results for various schemas
